de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample

Class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.counterexample.AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractSideProofCounterExampleGenerator, CounterExampleAction.MainWindowCounterExampleGenerator

    public abstract class AbstractCounterExampleGenerator
extends java.lang.Object
    Implementations of this class are used find a counter example for a given Sequent using the SMT solver SolverType.Z3_CE_SOLVER.

    This class provides the full logic independent from the a user interface. Subclasses are used to realize the user interface specific functionality.

    When #searchCounterExample(KeYMediator, Proof, Sequent) is called a new Proof is instantiated by #createProof(KeYMediator, Proof, Sequent). Next the macro SemanticsBlastingMacro is performed on the new Proof and when done the SMT solver is started. The progress of the SMT solver and the final result can be observed by a SolverLauncherListener instantiated. by #createSolverListener(SMTSettings).

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      AbstractCounterExampleGenerator()

      Creates a new Proof.

      Creates the SolverLauncherListener which handles the results of the launched SMT solver.
      static boolean isSolverAvailable()
      Checks if the required SMT solver is available.
      void searchCounterExample(UserInterfaceControl ui, Proof oldProof, Sequent oldSequent)
      Searches a counter example for the given Sequent.
      protected void semanticsBlastingCompleted(UserInterfaceControl ui)
      This method is called after the SemanticsBlastingMacro has been executed.

    • Method Detail

      • isSolverAvailable

        public static boolean isSolverAvailable()
        Checks if the required SMT solver is available.
        Returns:
        true solver is available, false solver is not available.

      • searchCounterExample

        public void searchCounterExample(UserInterfaceControl ui,
                                 Proof oldProof,
                                 Sequent oldSequent)
                          throws ProofInputException
        Searches a counter example for the given Sequent.
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
        oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
        oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.

      • createProof

        protected abstract Proof createProof(UserInterfaceControl ui,
                                     Proof oldProof,
                                     Sequent oldSequent,
                                     java.lang.String proofName)
                              throws ProofInputException
        Creates a new Proof.
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.
        oldProof - The old Proof used as template to instantiate a new one.
        oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
        proofName - The name for the new proof.
        Returns:
        The created Proof.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Ocurred Exception

      • createNewSequent

        protected Sequent createNewSequent(Sequent oldSequent)
        Creates the Sequent for the new Proof created by #createProof(KeYMediator, Proof, Sequent).
        Parameters:
        oldSequent - The Sequent to find a counter example for.
        Returns:
        The new Sequent.

      • semanticsBlastingCompleted

        protected void semanticsBlastingCompleted(UserInterfaceControl ui)
        This method is called after the SemanticsBlastingMacro has been executed.
        Parameters:
        ui - The UserInterfaceControl to use.

      • createSolverListener

        protected abstract SolverLauncherListener createSolverListener(SMTSettings settings,
                                                               Proof proof)
        Creates the SolverLauncherListener which handles the results of the launched SMT solver.
        Parameters:
        settings - The SMTSettings.
        proof - The Proof on which the SMT solver will be performed.
        Returns:
        The SolverLauncherListener to use.
